_description: LPP (Launchpad Pro Mk3) template schema for MoveMap — M8 control surface mode. Derived from midi_utils.mjs. Sources: LPP3 Programmer Reference Guide (Focusrite), M8+LPP recap by grahack (https://grahack.github.io/M8_LPP_recap/).

note_grid._description: Standard 10x10 LPP note layout. Rows 1-8 (top-left origin). Row 9 = bottom scene buttons (101-108). Row 10 = top function row (1-8).

pad_map_top_octave._description: Maps LPP pad note → Move pad note for the top octave view (rows 5-8 of LPP = rows 1-4 of Move). Step buttons (LPP scene row 101-108) map to Move step notes 16-30 (even).

pad_map_bottom_octave._description: Maps LPP pad note → Move pad note for the bottom octave view (rows 1-4 of LPP = rows 1-4 of Move). Step buttons same as top.

control_map_top_octave._description: Maps Move hardware CC numbers → LPP note numbers for button/control forwarding in top octave view.

control_map_bottom_octave._description: Maps Move hardware CC numbers → LPP note numbers for button/control forwarding in bottom octave view. Track buttons (40-43) map to lower rows.

move_hardware_constants._description: Move CC and note number assignments. Source: Ableton Move manual.

m8_knob_banks._description: MIDI CC layout for M8 parameter banks. All on channel 3 (zero-indexed). Source: M8+LPP recap.

M8_TRACK.note: Per-track: cc_base + pot_index + (10 * track_index) when track-scoped

lpp_init_sysex._description: Universal Device Inquiry SysEx that triggers M8 to enter LPP control surface mode. Packed as USB-MIDI cable 2 packets (4 bytes each). Source: LPP3 §2.1, MIDI 1.0 Spec.
lpp_init_sysex.note: M8 re-sends this sysex on reconnect; MoveMap watches for it to re-trigger the handshake

m8_identity_sysex._description: Sysex the M8 sends when it reconnects. MoveMap listens for this to re-initiate the LPP handshake.

color_palette._description: Move LED color constants and their LPP color index equivalents. LPP indices from LPP3 §7 (Colour Palette).

octave_toggle._description: Move Wheel Touch (note 9) toggles between top and bottom octave pad views. Wheel click (CC 3, value 127) suppresses the toggle on release.

aftertouch._description: Move poly aftertouch (status 0xA0) is converted to MIDI CC 1 (modwheel) and sent externally on channel 3.

usb_midi_format._description: USB-MIDI packet format used by movemap-runner. Each packet is 4 bytes: [CIN_CABLE, status, data1, data2]. Cable 0 = internal (Move hardware). Cable 2 = external (M8, USB hub devices).
